summary: Overbooking prevention feature fully verified. All 6 atomic booking tests pass (concurrent booking, adjacent dates, partial/full overlap, cancel-rebook, different rooms). Login flow works, dashboard loads with navigation modules visible, past-date booking rejection works with Turkish error message, README files correctly updated to Syroce PMS branding.
critical_code_review_comments: atomic_booking.py correctly implements room-night locking pattern with unique index on (tenant_id, room_id, night_date)
release_booking_nights() correctly called in reservation_state_machine.py on cancellation (line 92-96)
release_booking_nights() correctly called in update_reservation_service.py when status→cancelled (line 165-170)
create_reservation_service.py correctly delegates to create_booking_atomic via repository (line 141)
README files correctly branded as 'Syroce PMS' with accurate tech stack (React 19, Python 3.11+, Node.js 20+, MongoDB 7.0+)
seed_data_creation: Test bookings created with far-future dates (2050+) and cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Overbooking prevention feature fully implemented and tested. Uses room_night_locks collection with unique index ux_room_night on (tenant_id, room_id, night_date). Each booking claims N night documents. DuplicateKeyError = 409 Conflict. On cancellation, release_booking_nights deletes lock docs. Adjacent bookings allowed (checkout day not claimed). All navigation modules visible after login.

overbooking_prevention.adjacent_dates_allowed: PASS - checkout day = next checkin day works
overbooking_prevention.cancel_then_rebook: PASS - cancelled booking releases locks, rebook succeeds
